name: Exa
description:
Fast, intelligent web search and web crawling.

New mcp tool: Exa-code is a context tool for coding
longDescription: Fast, intelligent web search and web crawling powered by Exa. Provides web search, advanced search with filters, and webpage fetching as clean markdown. Free tier available.
author: ai.exa
examplePrompts: Search the web for the latest developments in quantum computing
Fetch and summarize this blog post
Find research papers about RAG architectures
Search for TypeScript tutorials from the last month
Compare funding data for AI startups
